data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for acknowledgment before shift booking/work assignment.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the acknowledgment requirement before shift booking or work assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the acknowledgment requirement, but without concrete evidence demonstrating its implementation, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of acknowledgment requirement before shift booking/work assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
